description_long: This is a small, young tree planted in a rectangular patch of dark, rich soil, surrounded on two sides by vertical panels displaying a sunset sky. The tree has a slender, light brown trunk and a single main stem with several short branches radiating outward. Its foliage is lush and green, consisting of numerous small, broad leaves that form a low, spreading canopy close to the ground. The soil appears freshly turned, with a slightly uneven surface and no visible grass or ground cover. The background panels create the illusion of an outdoor environment, enhancing the natural setting. No roots are visible above the soil, and the tree is the only living element in the scene.
description: A small, young tree with a slender trunk and dense green foliage, planted in dark soil and set against a sunset sky backdrop.
description_view_0: The tree is not visible; only the soil and the sunset sky panels are seen from this angle.
description_view_1: The tree is fully visible, showing its lush green foliage and slender trunk emerging from the soil, with the sunset sky in the background.
description_view_2: The tree is viewed from above, highlighting the spread of its green canopy and the arrangement of branches over the soil.
description_view_3: Similar to view 0, the tree is not visible; only the soil and sky panels are seen.
